text.div:
LinkIdTextCardinalityTypeDescription & Constraints
Questionnairehttp://fhir.org/guides/who/emcare/Questionnaire/EmCare.B6.Measurements#0.1.0
EmCare.B6.DE01The client's axillary temperature in degrees Celsius (temperature taken under the armpit)0..1decimalDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.B6.DE02The health care worker prefers to take the client's rectal temperature0..1booleanDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.B6.DE01').answer.value.empty()
EmCare.B6.DE03The client's rectal temperature in degrees Celsius (temperature taken in the rectum)0..1decimalDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.B6.DE02').answer.value = true
EmCare.B6.DE04A thermometer is not available to accurately measure the client's temperature0..1booleanDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.B6.DE01').answer.value.empty().not()
EmCare.B6.DE05The client is hot to touch0..1booleanDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.B6.DE04').answer.value = true
EmCare.B6.DE06The client's weight in Kilograms0..1decimalDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.B6.DE07The client's weight cannot be measured0..1booleanDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.B6.DE06').answer.value.empty()
EmCare.B6.DE08The client's weight has been estimated - to be used for treatment dosing only0..1booleanDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.B6.DE07').answer.value = true
EmCare.A.DE10Age auto-calculated (presented as number of years, months, days) of the client based on date of birth OR estimated age OR based on auto-calculation from estimaged date of birth0..1decimalDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Initial Value: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE10').answer.value
EmCare.B6.DE09The client's height in Centimeters0..1quantityDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE10').answer.value>=24
EmCare.B6.DE10The health care worker would prefer to measure the client using length0..1booleanDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.B6.DE09').answer.value.empty()
EmCare.B6.DE11The client's height cannot be measured0..1booleanDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.B6.DE09').answer.value.empty()
EmCare.B6.DE12The client's length in Centimeters0..1quantityDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE10').answer.value<24 or %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.B6.DE09').answer.value.empty()
EmCare.B6.DE13The client's length cannot be measured0..1booleanDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: IF 'Length' entered
EmCare.B6.DE14The client's weight for height Z Score0..1integerDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.B6.DE15The client's weight for length Z Score0..1integerDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.B6.DE16The client's weight for age z score0..1integerDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
EmCare.B6.DE17The client's Mid Upper Arm Circumference in Millimeters (child ≥6 months old)0..1decimalDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE10').answer.value>=6
EmCare.B6.DE18The health care worker visually assesses for whether underweight (for drug dosing calculations)0..1choiceDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
Expressions:
  • Enable When: %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.B6.DE06').answer.value.empty() and %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.B6.DE17').answer.value.empty() and %resource.repeat(item).where(linkId='EmCare.A.DE10').answer.value>=6
EmCare.B6.DE22The date when the measurement was taken0..1dateDefinition: https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes

Documentation for this format

item.text: The client's axillary temperature in degrees Celsius (temperature taken under the armpit)
The health care worker prefers to take the client's rectal temperature
The client's rectal temperature in degrees Celsius (temperature taken in the rectum)
A thermometer is not available to accurately measure the client's temperature
The client is hot to touch
The client's weight in Kilograms
The client's weight cannot be measured
The client's weight has been estimated - to be used for treatment dosing only
Age auto-calculated (presented as number of years, months, days) of the client based on date of birth OR estimated age OR based on auto-calculation from estimaged date of birth
The client's height in Centimeters
The health care worker would prefer to measure the client using length
The client's height cannot be measured
The client's length in Centimeters
The client's length cannot be measured
The client's weight for height Z Score
The client's weight for length Z Score
The client's weight for age z score
The client's Mid Upper Arm Circumference in Millimeters (child ≥6 months old)
The health care worker visually assesses for whether underweight (for drug dosing calculations)
The date when the measurement was taken
